name: Chat Archive (PostgreSQL)
description: Archives all Telegram chat messages + agent sessions to PostgreSQL. Stores media locally.

databaseUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Falls back to DATABASE_URL env.

mediaStoragePath.description: Absolute path to local media storage directory.

maxStorageGb.description: Max media storage in GB. Oldest files deleted when exceeded.

archiveChannels.description: Which channels to archive. Default: all telegram.

logAgentSessions.description: Log agent prompts and responses (PR #19462 feature).

downloadMedia.description: Download media files to local storage.
